name: Tangy Chicken Breasts Baked with Black Bean Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh lime juice (or lemon juice)
4 skinned and boned chicken breast halves
15 ounces black beans, canned, rinsed and drained
1 pound fresh tomatoes, cut into wedges
3 tablespoons fresh cilantro leaves, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. For the chicken: In a bowl, combine lime (or lemon) juice, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Rub each breast with the marinade and set aside for at least 1 to 2 hours.
2. For the salsa: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. In a large bowl, toss together black beans, onions, squash, zucchini, garlic, tomatoes, and cilantro. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Place the beans in a 13x9-inch baking pan and arrange the chicken breasts on top. Pour any remaining marinade over the chicken breasts.
4. Bake until the chicken is golden brown and the vegetables are tender, about 1 hour.
5. Serves 4.
